commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a diagnostics-otel scoped unhandled-rejection handler for nested OTLPExporterError values, unregisters it on stop/restart, adds regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. The source path is high-confidence: current main has no OTLPExporterError-specific diagnostics-otel handler, core exits early only when a registered handler returns true, and OpenTelemetry constructs OTLPExporterError for non-retryable OTLP HTTP failures; I did not run a live collector shutdown in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair job is needed; this automerge-armed PR has no actionable review findings and should proceed through required checks and mergeability gates.
